description_long: This is a modern, cubic house surrounded by dense clusters of trees and greenery, with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring large windows and a simple, geometric facade. A driveway leads up to a garage or carport, with a car parked in front, and the main entrance is subtly integrated into the front elevation. The landscaping is lush, with mature trees providing privacy and a natural buffer around the property. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, white, cubic two-story house with large windows, flat roof, and lush tree coverage. Features a driveway, carport, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and the house surrounded by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, upper terrace, and extensive tree coverage on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with the flat roof and dense trees almost encircling the house, minimal facade details visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the tiered structure, large windows, and the house nestled within the trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flush door, no porch, and direct access from driveway; integrated into the facade with no decorative elements.
